race.description: Happy Birthday Dean Mirfin Maiden Hcp
race.comment: BLUE POLES (4) got too far back on debut at Muswellbrook but did start to warm late. Drawn much kinder this time and is sure to have come on from the experience. Is from a smart stable and deserves following up over this longer journey. SIX KINGS (7) has been thereabouts in his three runs back without causing any real threat to the winners. Fitter now though and is drawn favourably. Not taking lightly. FLYING GISELLE (9) only warmed late when resuming at Newcastle at a huge quote. The added trip suits, so wary of her running on late. PIROULETTE (6) battled away soundly into fourth on debut at Queanbeyan. Better for that and can play a more significant role this time.
